text: AI agents can process due diligence documents significantly faster than human analysts, completing 400 documents in two hours versus three to four days
speaker: Marcus Webb

text: The agentic system achieved 94% accuracy on material findings and identified additional items missed by the human team
speaker: Marcus Webb

text: A 6% miss rate in due diligence is unacceptable because a single missed liability clause can invalidate the entire economic model
speaker: Priya Patel

text: AI agents should serve as an augmentation layer for first-pass extraction, with senior analysts performing verification, rather than replacing human review entirely
speaker: Marcus Webb

text: Value-based pricing on deal complexity and turnaround time can deliver 30% fee reduction to clients while improving margins by 15%
speaker: Priya Patel

text: Competitive pressure from McKinsey Digital and Bain necessitates moving on AI-assisted due diligence within Q2 to maintain first-mover advantage
speaker: Marcus Webb
